extended_lyrics_archive: Syllables mapped to the drum-kit events / Logic collapses, the silence relents
4:3 polyrhythm, the heart of the machine / Breathing in spaces that no one has seen
G-Inversion active, the process is done / Result is the zero, the many are one
Wavetable shifting, the Monster 7 grows / Through the Phrygian darkness the frequency flows

semantic_variables.variable_x: Dynamic slot for user-injected themes (Cybernetics, Singularity, Recursive Chaos)
semantic_variables.variable_y: Soundscape anchor (Cold Industrial, Organic Shamanic, Dystopian Precision)
